---
title: Datasets
listing:
  contents: "*.md"
  type: table
  fields: [studyId, name, cancerTypeId]
  field-display-names:
    studyId: "Study ID"
    name: "Name"
    cancerTypeId: "Cancer type"
  field-links: [studyId]
  sort: "studyId asc"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  page-size: 100
---
